items.title: BOTT Surged 114% but Its Korean and Chinese Holdings Carry Serious Risks
items.description: The global push to automate physical labor, driven by aging workforces, rising wages, and manufacturing reshoring has created genuine investor demand for pure-play humanoid robotics exposure. Themes Humanoid Robotics ETF (NASDAQ:BOTT) attempts to fill that gap, but the tradeoffs matter before any allocation decision. What BOTT Is Built to Do BOTT tracks the Solactive Global ...
